source.title: Technical Summary for S-Gamut3.Cine/S-Log3 and S-Gamut3/S-Log3
source.url_note: Original URL serves HTTP 403 to non-browser clients as of 2026-07-19; fetched from the Internet Archive snapshot of the same URL.

notes: Formulas quoted from the Appendix (page 6). 'reflection = IRE * 0.9' per the document. Encode: if in >= 0.01125000: out = (420.0 + log10((in + 0.01) / (0.18 + 0.01)) * 261.5) / 1023.0, else out = (in * (171.2102946929 - 95.0)/0.01125000 + 95.0) / 1023.0. Decode: if in >= 171.2102946929/1023.0: out = (10.0 ^ ((in * 1023.0 - 420.0) / 261.5)) * (0.18 + 0.01) - 0.01, else out = (in * 1023.0 - 95.0) * 0.01125000 / (171.2102946929 - 95.0). The document's decode else-branch line contains a typographic 'out +' where 'out =' is meant; recorded verbatim here, interpreted as assignment.
